mapper.select: SELECT announcement_id, title, content, publish_time, status, create_by FROM announcement WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, publish_time, status, create_by) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE announcement
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
status = #{status},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
WHERE announcement_id = #{announcementId}
